title: function sys.isaURL(url) should have been declared as sys.isaURL(string)
poc: create table t6785 (v varchar(99), u url);
select * from t6785 order by v;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t6785 (v VARCHAR(99), u URL, n INT DEFAULT 0);
SELECT * FROM t6785 WHERE u IS NOT NULL ORDER BY v;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t6785 WHERE u LIKE 'http%';
